title: Planet Labs (PL) Q3 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text:
Planet Labs, an earth imaging satellite company trading on NYSE under ticker PL, will report Q3 earnings this Wednesday after market hours.

Recent Performance:
The company exceeded analyst expectations last quarter with revenue of $73.39 million, representing 20.1% year-over-year growth and an 11.2% revenue beat.

Q3 Expectations:
Analysts project revenue growth of 17.7% year-over-year to $72.13 million, with an expected adjusted loss of $0.04 per share. The company has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates three times over the last two years.

Analyst Outlook:
Analysts have generally reconfirmed their estimates over the last 30 days, suggesting confidence in their projections. The average analyst price target stands at $14.55, compared to the current share price of $13.10.

Peer Context:
Within the data and business process services segment, peers Broadridge and CSG showed mixed results, with market reactions ranging from flat to slightly negative following their earnings announcements.
